text.title: Quarterly Retainer Review Script Output Contract
text.summary: Defines the QBR artifact bundle: deck, decision-record, and follow-up email. Subagent must satisfy this before the call is considered complete.

forbidden.pattern: qbr_deck with > 6 slides — kills the 45-min cap
decision_record.decision == "deferred" without a follow-up date set
scope_delta missing when decision is scale_up or scope_down
utilization_metrics computed from estimates rather than tracked data (Toggl, Harvest, Clockify export)
qbr_deck slides containing narrative paragraphs > 50 words — should be data + headline only

allowed-transformations.transformation: "deferred_with_date" decision is allowed if the client names a specific date by which they'll commit to one of the 4 options; that date binds the next call.
If a slide's data shows red status, an "options" bullet list may accompany the chart on that slide — does not violate the no-narrative rule.
Multilingual clients: deck may be bilingual; talking-points template stays in agency's working language.

list.item: utilization_metrics sourced from a tracking tool (named in deck)
decision_record.decision is one of {continue, scale_up, scope_down, terminate, deferred_with_date}
scope_delta populated when decision is scale_up / scope_down
